LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT R. GOLDSTEIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER, COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENY DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS I.T.-1.4, GRANT DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE FOLLOWING PROVISIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT: PARAGRAPH I.T.-7 THAT READS: "IN AN EFFORT TO RE-ESTABLISH THE RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF" AND "IN A FURTHER EFFORT TO RE-ESTABLISH THE RELATIONSHIP." PARAGRAPH I.T.-8 THAT READS; "AND DID RE-ESTABLISH HER RELATIONSHIP WITH HIM." PARAGRAPH I.T.-9 THAT READS: "TO RE-ESTABLISH HER RELATIONSHIP WITH GOLDSTEIN." F.R.-2.A.3 "GOLDSTEIN REPRESENTATED THAT HE HAD NO RELATIONSHIP WITH OSUNA AS OF OCTOBER 1, 2004." F.R.2B.2 "GOLDSTEIN HAD AN ONGOING RELATIONSHIP WITH OSUNA OF SOME TYPE."
